languages.text: {n}Самодовольный хохоток Тразина заставляет вас вздрогнуть.{/n} "С тех пор, как твоя выходка в Музеоне привлекла мое внимание, я узнал многое о возне людей в этом регионе космоса. Достаточно сказать, что определенная часть этой возни вызывает у меня интерес. А что интересно мне, априори интересно и тебе, мо{mf|й|я} соглядат{mf|ай|ельница}".

{n}Trazyn's smug chuckle makes you flinch.{/n} "Ever since your little escapade in the Museion drew my attention, I have learned a great deal about the scurrying of humans in this region of space. Suffice it to say, a certain portion of that scurrying has piqued my interest. And what interests me is naturally of interest to you, my informant."
languages.original_text: {n}Самодовольный хохоток Тразина заставляет вас вздрогнуть.{/n} "С тех пор, как твоя выходка в Музеоне привлекла мое внимание, я узнал многое о возне людей в этом регионе космоса. Достаточно сказать, что определенная часть этой возни вызывает у меня интерес. А что интересно мне, априори интересно и тебе, мо{mf|й|я} соглядат{mf|ай|ельница}".

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn's smug chuckle makes you flinch.{/n} "Ever since your little escapade in the Museon drew my attention, I have learned a great deal about the scurrying of humans in this region of space. Suffice it to say, a certain portion of that scurrying has piqued my interest. And what interests me is, a priori, of interest to you, my {mf|observer|observeress}}."

Suffice it to say, a certain portion of that scurrying has piqued my interest. And what interests me is naturally of interest to you, my audience."

{n}Trazyn's smug chuckle makes you flinch.{/n} "Ever since your little escapade in the Museion drew my attention, I have learned a great deal about the scurrying of humans in this region of space. Suffice it to say, a certain portion of that scurrying has piqued my interest. And what interests me is naturally of interest to you, my audience."

{n}Trazyn's smug chuckle makes you flinch.{/n} "Ever since your little escapade in the Museion drew my attention, I have learned a great deal about the scurrying of humans in this region of space. Suffice it to say, a certain portion of that scurrying has piqued my interest. And what interests me is naturally of interest to you, my informant."

languages.text: {n}特拉金得意的轻笑让你畏缩了一下。{/n}“自打你在陈列馆的那场小小冒险引起了我的注意之后，我可是了解了不少这片星域里人类的鼠窜行径。简而言之，他们的一些小小忙碌勾起了我的兴趣。而我感兴趣的事，自然也会引起你的兴趣，我的情报人员。”
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's smug chuckle makes you flinch.{/n} "Ever since your little escapade in the Museion drew my attention, I have learned a great deal about the scurrying of humans in this region of space. Suffice it to say, a certain portion of that scurrying has piqued my interest. And what interests me is naturally of interest to you, my informant."

traits.locale_text: {n}特拉金得意的轻笑让你畏缩了一下。{/n}“自打你在陈列馆的那场小小冒险引起了我的注意之后，我可是了解了不少这片星域里人类的鼠窜行径。简而言之，他们的一些小小忙碌勾起了我的兴趣。而我感兴趣的事，自然也会引起你的兴趣，我的情报人员。”

languages.text: {n}La arrogante risa de Trazyn hace que te estremezcas.{/n} «Desde que tu pequeña intrusión en el Museion ha llamado mi atención, he descubierto muchas cosas sobre los humanos que corretean por esta región del espacio. Digamos que algunas de sus acciones me interesan y, por lo tanto, te interesan a ti, mi informador{mf||a}».
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's smug chuckle makes you flinch.{/n} "Ever since your little escapade in the Museion drew my attention, I have learned a great deal about the scurrying of humans in this region of space. Suffice it to say, a certain portion of that scurrying has piqued my interest. And what interests me is naturally of interest to you, my informant."

traits.locale_text: {n}La arrogante risa de Trazyn hace que te estremezcas.{/n} «Desde que tu pequeña intrusión en el Museion ha llamado mi atención, he descubierto muchas cosas sobre los humanos que corretean por esta región del espacio. Digamos que algunas de sus acciones me interesan y, por lo tanto, te interesan a ti, mi informador{mf||a}».

languages.text: {n}Le rire suffisant de Trazyn vous fait frémir.{/n} « Depuis la petite escapade au Muséion qui vous a valu mon attention, j'ai appris bien des choses sur les déplacements des humains dans cette région de l'espace. Inutile de dire qu'une partie de ces déplacements a piqué mon intérêt, et naturellement, ce qui m'intéresse vous intéresse aussi. »
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's smug chuckle makes you flinch.{/n} "Ever since your little escapade in the Museion drew my attention, I have learned a great deal about the scurrying of humans in this region of space. Suffice it to say, a certain portion of that scurrying has piqued my interest. And what interests me is naturally of interest to you, my informant."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le rire suffisant de Trazyn vous fait frémir.{/n} « Depuis la petite escapade au Muséion qui vous a valu mon attention, j'ai appris bien des choses sur les déplacements des humains dans cette région de l'espace. Inutile de dire qu'une partie de ces déplacements a piqué mon intérêt, et naturellement, ce qui m'intéresse vous intéresse aussi. »

languages.text: {n}Trazyn'in kendini beğenmiş kıkırdaması, irkilmene neden oluyor.{/n} "Museion'daki küçük kaçamağın dikkatimi çektiğinden beri insanların uzayın bu bölgesindeki koşuşturmalarına dair pek çok şey öğrendim. Sadece şunu söyleyebilirim, bu koşuşturmanın belirli bir kısmı ilgimi çekti. Benim ilgimi çeken şey, bilgi kaynağım olarak doğal olarak senin de ilgini çeker."
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's smug chuckle makes you flinch.{/n} "Ever since your little escapade in the Museion drew my attention, I have learned a great deal about the scurrying of humans in this region of space. Suffice it to say, a certain portion of that scurrying has piqued my interest. And what interests me is naturally of interest to you, my informant."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn'in kendini beğenmiş kıkırdaması, irkilmene neden oluyor.{/n} "Museion'daki küçük kaçamağın dikkatimi çektiğinden beri insanların uzayın bu bölgesindeki koşuşturmalarına dair pek çok şey öğrendim. Sadece şunu söyleyebilirim, bu koşuşturmanın belirli bir kısmı ilgimi çekti. Benim ilgimi çeken şey, bilgi kaynağım olarak doğal olarak senin de ilgini çeker."

languages.text: {n}Trazyns selbstgefälliges Lachen lässt dich zusammenzucken.{/n} "Seit deine kleine Eskapade im Museion meine Aufmerksamkeit weckte, habe ich viel über das Getrippel der Menschen in dieser Region des Weltraums gehört. Und ich gebe zu, ein Teil dieses Getrippels hat mein Interesse geweckt. Und was mich interessiert, interessiert natürlich auch dich, meinen Informanten."
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's smug chuckle makes you flinch.{/n} "Ever since your little escapade in the Museion drew my attention, I have learned a great deal about the scurrying of humans in this region of space. Suffice it to say, a certain portion of that scurrying has piqued my interest. And what interests me is naturally of interest to you, my informant."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyns selbstgefälliges Lachen lässt dich zusammenzucken.{/n} "Seit deine kleine Eskapade im Museion meine Aufmerksamkeit weckte, habe ich viel über das Getrippel der Menschen in dieser Region des Weltraums gehört. Und ich gebe zu, ein Teil dieses Getrippels hat mein Interesse geweckt. Und was mich interessiert, interessiert natürlich auch dich, meinen Informanten."

languages.text: {n}トラズンの鼻で笑う声に、あなたは身じろぎする。{/n} 「ムゼイオンでの君のちょっとした冒険が私の注意を引いて以来、この地域の宇宙空間における人間の動きについて、私は多くのことを学んできた。要するに、その動きの一部が私の興味を引いた。そして、私が興味を持つものは、当然ながら、君の情報源である君にも興味深いものだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's smug chuckle makes you flinch.{/n} "Ever since your little escapade in the Museion drew my attention, I have learned a great deal about the scurrying of humans in this region of space. Suffice it to say, a certain portion of that scurrying has piqued my interest. And what interests me is naturally of interest to you, my informant."

traits.locale_text: {n}トラズンの鼻で笑う声に、あなたは身じろぎする。{/n} 「ムゼイオンでの君のちょっとした冒険が私の注意を引いて以来、この地域の宇宙空間における人間の動きについて、私は多くのことを学んできた。要するに、その動きの一部が私の興味を引いた。そして、私が興味を持つものは、当然ながら、君の情報源である君にも興味深いものだ。」
